title: AI Transparency Listening Session with the White House Office of Management and Budget
description: The White House Office of Management and Budget (OMB) is leading a series of listening sessions to learn more from industry about their approaches to AI transparency and auditable risk management.

title: AI in Action: 5 Essential Findings from the 2024 Federal AI Use Case Inventory
description: This year, agencies publicly reported more than 1,700 ways they are using Artificial Intelligence (AI) to advance their missions and deliver better experiences to the public.

title: CISO Council and CDO Council Release Joint Guide on Federal Zero Trust Data Security
description: Today, the CISO Council and CDO Council released the Federal Zero Trust (ZT) Data Security Guide, a first-of-its-kind document and key deliverable of OMB M-22-09.

title: The Top 10 Things Federal Technology Leaders Should Know About OMB’s Draft AI Policy
description: In October 2023, President Biden signed Executive Order 14110 on safe, secure, and trustworthy AI. This article outlines key considerations for AI policy and risk management.
